response: In April, the company achieved a 10K monthly active user milestone, closed a Series A funding round of $8 million at a $40 million pre-money valuation, and hired a VP of Sales. Current metrics show a monthly recurring revenue of $85K with a 12% month-over-month increase, a burn rate of $120K/month, and an 11-month runway post-funding, with the fundraising process closing on May 10.
